axes.label: Assessment Builder / Designer
axes.question: Can an assessment be designed, composed & configured?

axes.label: Blueprint Framework
axes.question: Can a blueprint (distribution + mix + time/marks) be defined & bound?

axes.label: Validation Framework
axes.question: Is an assessment validated (structure/blueprint/rules/config/readiness) before publish?

axes.label: Version Management
axes.question: Are major/minor/draft versions tracked, comparable, rollback-able & clonable?

dimensions.label: Assessment Builder / Designer
dimensions.statusNote: ONE canonical authoring record (ab_assessments) composing the existing CAF builder + assembly + writer — design/edit/clone/version/archive/restore/publish, no duplicate builder.

dimensions.label: Blueprint Framework
dimensions.statusNote: Competency/behaviour/domain distribution + question/difficulty mix + time/marks, composing the existing blueprint engines into the ab_blueprints overlay.

dimensions.label: Validation Framework
dimensions.statusNote: Seven read-time checks (missing questions/empty sections/duplicates/blueprint/rule/config/publishing-readiness) recorded to ab_validation_runs; assessment is validation-clean before publish.

dimensions.label: Version Management
dimensions.statusNote: Append-only ab_assessment_versions — major/minor/draft, compare, rollback, clone, audit history (lossless snapshots).

dimensions.label: Publishing / Approval Workflow
dimensions.statusNote: draft→review→approved→published→active→deprecated→archived audit ledger (ab_workflow) with mandatory human approval; publish blocked until validation-clean.

dimensions.label: Assessment Authoring APIs
dimensions.statusNote: CRUD + builder + blueprint + version + validation + publishing endpoints under /api/admin/assessment-builder, composing existing authoring routes.

dimensions.label: Builder Frontend
dimensions.statusNote: Super-admin certification console + reused CAF builder / blueprint / mapping / preview UI (compose/blueprint/rules/validation/preview/version/approval surfaces).

designer_actions.label: Create assessment
designer_actions.note: ab_assessments authoring record (composes caf_assessments/assessment_blueprints by reference).

designer_actions.label: Edit assessment
designer_actions.note: Structure/config JSONB edited in place; every save snapshots a version.

designer_actions.label: Clone assessment
designer_actions.note: Deep copy → new authoring record via cloneAssessment (reuse version snapshot).

designer_actions.label: Archive assessment
designer_actions.note: Workflow transition to archived (reversible, never destructive).

designer_actions.label: Restore assessment
designer_actions.note: Workflow transition back to draft/active from archived.

designer_actions.label: Publish assessment
designer_actions.note: Workflow transition to published/active after human approval + validation-clean.

structure_levels.label: Page
structure_levels.note: Structure JSONB page grouping within a section.

composition_caps.label: Add question
composition_caps.note: Bind a question ref into a section (caf_section_questions / structure JSONB).

composition_caps.label: Question pool
composition_caps.note: Fixed pool of candidate questions per section.

composition_caps.label: Mandatory question
composition_caps.note: Required flag on a bound question.

composition_caps.label: Optional question
composition_caps.note: Optional flag on a bound question.

composition_caps.label: Section rule
composition_caps.note: Per-section min/max/select rules in structure JSONB.

mapping_model.label: Product blueprint
mapping_model.note: Assessment is a first-class product-blueprint artifact.

mapping_model.label: Personas
mapping_model.note: Assessment bound to persona(s) via template + config.

mapping_model.label: Lifecycle
mapping_model.note: Assessment mapped to a lifecycle stage (entry/baseline/diagnostic/…).

mapping_model.label: Customer journey
mapping_model.note: Assessment is the entry/re-measure step of the journey spine.

mapping_model.label: Question library
mapping_model.note: Assessment composes questions from the canonical library.

mapping_model.label: Outcomes
mapping_model.note: Assessment feeds the outcome framework at runtime (author-side declared).

decisions.title: One canonical builder, no fork
decisions.decision: ab_assessments OVERLAYS the existing CAF builder / assembly / writer by reference — it never forks caf_assessments or spawns a second builder. Authoring capabilities the legacy builder lacks (unified versioning, blueprint framework binding, validation runs, approval workflow, template library) are ADDED as additive ab_* overlay, not a V2.

decisions.title: Authoring only — not delivery/scoring
decisions.decision: Phase 3.3 designs/composes/configures/validates/versions/approves/publishes assessments. It does NOT deliver, score, or run psychometrics — that is the runtime (assessment-runtime-orchestrator, caf-runtime, competency-assessment-runtime) and is out of scope.

decisions.title: Flag-gated, byte-identical OFF incl. schema
decisions.decision: All DDL is confined to ensureAbSchema, which asserts the assessmentBuilder flag first → flag OFF creates 0 tables. Every route 503s before auth when OFF. OFF is byte-identical to legacy.

decisions.title: Seven dimensions never composited
decisions.decision: builder · blueprint · validation · version_management · publishing · apis · frontend are certified INDEPENDENTLY and reported SEPARATELY. Coverage ⟂ Confidence ⟂ Adoption. A dimension can be SUPPORTED while adoption is honestly 0.

decisions.title: Adoption is a usage axis, never a gap
decisions.decision: Real authored-assessment VOLUME across the ab_* overlay is reported SEPARATELY. Zero authored assessments is honest engineering-closure with 0 adoption — NEVER a gap, NEVER fabricated. null (unreadable) ≠ 0 (empty).

decisions.title: Validation is read-time, non-blocking to storage
decisions.decision: Validation checks compute against the authoring record on demand and are recorded to ab_validation_runs. They gate PUBLISH (human decision) but never mutate the assessment or throw destructively.

axis_repository_alignment.note: Every dimension evidence claim is verified INDEPENDENTLY against the live FS (services/routes/frontend) and DB (to_regclass). null (unknown) ≠ 0 (absent). Coverage-only — kept SEPARATE from Confidence/Adoption. ab_* overlay tables are absent while the flag has never run its write paths — that is expected + honest.

adoption.note: ADOPTION is real authored/managed assessment volume across the ab_* overlay. It is a usage axis reported SEPARATELY from engineering closure — NEVER a gap, NEVER fabricated. null (unreadable) ≠ 0 (empty).

resolved_gaps.summary: No single canonical authoring record unifying the CAF builder / assembly / writer.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: ab_assessments overlay + assessment-builder-mechanisms (create/edit/clone) composing existing builders.

resolved_gaps.summary: Blueprint distribution/mix/time/marks not bound to a first-class authoring blueprint.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: ab_blueprints overlay + upsertBlueprint composing assessment-blueprint-engine / blueprint-builder.

resolved_gaps.summary: No major/minor/draft version history with compare/rollback/clone.
No review→approve→publish→archive workflow with human approval.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: ab_workflow audit ledger + workflowTransition (7-state model, publish blocked until validation-clean).
routes/assessment-builder.ts composing existing authoring routes under one base.
AssessmentBuilderPanel certification console reusing CAF builder / blueprint / mapping / preview UI.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Enterprise Assessment Builder: a single certified AUTHORING layer COMPOSING the existing assessment services (CAF builder, blueprint engines, assembly, writer, architecture) under one registry + an additive ab_* overlay — NO duplicate builder, NO V2, NO breaking change. Scope is AUTHORING ONLY (design/compose/configure/validate/version/approve/publish) — it does NOT deliver, score, or run psychometrics. All SEVEN dimensions (builder · blueprint · validation · version_management · publishing · apis · frontend) are SUPPORTED: the true gaps (unified authoring record, blueprint framework binding, pre-publish validation, major/minor/draft version history with compare/rollback/clone, review→approve→publish→archive workflow with human approval, unified API surface, single builder console) were ENGINEERING-CLOSED via REUSE-before-build (own additive overlay tables + helpers). All former gaps AB-1..AB-7 are RESOLVED (AB_GAPS = [] → 0 open), each gated by assessmentBuilder so OFF is byte-identical incl. schema (all DDL runs only on the flag-gated write paths). What remains is ADOPTION — real authored-assessment VOLUME across the overlay — a usage axis reported SEPARATELY, NEVER a gap. Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption never composited; null≠0; nothing fabricated; the platform is enhanced-only.
